addPauser(address).details: Should be callable only by ACL owner.

params.account: The address to be added in the set of pausers.

getVersion().details: Despite PauserSet not being upgradeable, could be useful for debugging purpose.

removePauser(address).details: Should be callable only by ACL owner.

params.account: The address to be removed from the set of pausers.

addPauser(address).notice: Adds a new account as pauser.

getVersion().notice: Returns the versions of the PauserSet contract in SemVer format.

isPauser(address).notice: Returns wether specified account is in the set of pausers.
